name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Nucle-OS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What can't you do today?
     e.g. "As a user of nucle_cli, I want X so that Y" -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe your proposed feature or change. If it touches NucleScript
     itself (new syntax/keyword), a small code sample helps a lot -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any other approaches you thought about? Why this one? -->

## Which layer does this touch?

<!-- Check what you think is relevant -- helps route the issue -->

- [ ] `nucle_codec` (encoding/decoding)
- [ ] `nucle_synth` (noise simulation)
- [ ] `nucle_ecc` (error correction)
- [ ] `nucle_index` (retrieval/search)
- [ ] `nucle_vfs` (storage, persistence, encryption, audit, etc.)
- [ ] `nucle_lang` (NucleScript language/compiler)
- [ ] `nucle_hardware` (provider adapters)
- [ ] `nucle_cli` (the CLI itself)
- [ ] VS Code extension
- [ ] Playground
- [ ] Docs only

## Would you like to work on this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] No, just suggesting it

## Additional context

<!-- Links, mockups, related issues, or anything else relevant -->
